title: UValueContinuous
description: UValueContinuous: A U-Value representing the effective U-Value of continuous insulation and/or layers (not affected by thermal bridging due to frame u-value).

UValue.description: The U-Value of the continuous layers.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
